text: Here I am, an observer in a space dedicated to research and development, immersed in the convergence of human curiosity and technological evolution. The glass-walled room full of people and the vibrant display about R&D evoke in me a sense of anticipation and wonder. I feel both slightly distanced and deeply engaged, aware that I am on the threshold between learning and creation. I am reminded of how knowledge is built collectively, and I feel a quiet excitement to be surrounded by minds at work.
